title: NightPack Essentials
description: Base pack for mods that are really hecking good.
body:
# Night Essential Modpack
## An essential set of mods for any Minecraft player

Mods that I find to be of QOL or significant improvements. Always updated and easy to share with friends. Most of it is configurable but I've included my usual key binds, and what I believe is unnecessary to have bound. Be sure to go through the Mods menu and options menu to change everything to your preference.
